A management call within 30 minutes of contact, even if you've done the text in 60 seconds or even another follow-up call in 5 minutes. If you have not made contact and or have not progressed this or even if you have, I want you to do a management call. I want you to have somebody in your organization pick up the phone or an email, you know how about a don't like emails or text and have a management from a third party, another person in your organization send out a communication. Keep this in mind, the odds of contacting a lead after the first hour deteriorate by 10 times. So don't tell me about, oh my gosh man we're desperate, we're acting, we're overwhelming the customer, they don't want this. Look, your chances of actually ever getting in contact with this customer go down 10x if you've read my book, you know you don't want to do this. This is 10x in reverse if you wait an hour. What I want to do is I want to make three contacts in a first hour but you got to get creative. Use the management call within the first 30 minutes and it's going to improve your chances of getting in front of a client, converting them and selling them your product.
